serverInfo.name: merrysails-public
serverInfo.title: MerrySails — Bosphorus Cruise Read-Only MCP
serverInfo.description: Public, unauthenticated, read-only MCP surface for AI agents that need real-time pricing, availability windows, and content references for Bosphorus cruises operated by MerrySails (TÜRSAB A-Group #14316, Istanbul, since 2001). Booking + payment intentionally NOT exposed via MCP — those run through the agent-skills `request-quote` contact channel (WhatsApp / Telegram @merrysails / email).

legal.address: Alemdar Mah. Divanyolu Cad. Oğul Han No:62 İç Kapı No: 402, 34093 Fatih, Istanbul, Turkey

transport.note: Endpoint is reserved; live MCP transport will follow once SEP-1649 finalizes the server-card schema. Until then, agents should consume the equivalent data via /openapi.json (OpenAPI 3.1), /agents.md, and /.well-known/agent-skills/index.json.

advertisedResources.name: sitemap
advertisedResources.description: Canonical sitemap index — every commercial page, blog post, and guide on merrysails.com.

advertisedResources.name: api-catalog
advertisedResources.description: RFC 9727 API catalog pointing to the OpenAPI service description.

advertisedResources.name: service-desc
advertisedResources.description: Public REST API surface (OpenAPI 3.1) — pricing, package list, departure schedule.

advertisedResources.name: service-meta
advertisedResources.description: Machine-readable single source of truth (Dataset + Service + Article JSON-LD).
